message:
refactor(c_interop): Mirror CPython directory structure

Reorganize c_interop files to match CPython's Include/, Objects/,
Modules/, Python/ structure for easier cross-referencing.

- src/include/ - Core API (29 files, mirrors CPython Include/)
- src/objects/ - Type implementations (23 files, mirrors Objects/)
- src/modules/ - Extension modules (22 files, mirrors Modules/)
- src/python/ - Interpreter files (2 files, mirrors Python/)

File renames follow CPython conventions:
- cpython_*.zig → include/*.zig (e.g., cpython_object.zig → object.zig)
- pyobject_*.zig → objects/*object.zig (e.g., pyobject_list.zig → listobject.zig)

Also fixes assertIsNone(null) in unittest assertions.
